name: SVCollege Practical Exam Guides
goal: Three practical, colorful, easy guides for the SVCollege Full Stack exam

outputs.purpose: Entry page for the guide package
Explain the idea behind each major topic
Solve homework and exam practice tasks
Runbook for what to do during the exam
One page emergency cheat sheet for the day before the exam and exam day
Detailed forward task list with timing table, gates, and 114-video watching plan for the remaining 100 hours 20 minutes
Choose which guide to open first based on the student's current situation
One printable condensed pack for all three guides
Closed 100 hours 20 minutes study path with daily gates and 114-video watching plan
Local progress tracker for the 100 hours 20 minutes study path
Status page that explains what to open first and which files are ready
Map source materials to the three guides
How to use and print the guide package
Local integrity check for files, internal links, print support, and forbidden patterns
Shared day-by-day board with lag alert and next task action for all guide pages
Strict smoke audit for the closed route UX (two arrows, map, progress, day board)
Runtime browser smoke for the closed route UX across all guide pages
Aggregate release gate for verify + closed route static smoke + browser runtime smoke
One-command strict runner for all practical guides gates
